sub_modules.conv3d_coord: Computes depth, row, and column coordinates from the flattened input stream index.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_valid: Detects when the current stream position has a complete valid-padding 3D convolution window.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate array for the flattened K1 by K2 by K3 voxel window and kernel.
sub_modules.conv3d_output_cast: Truncates the wide MAC result to the top-level output width.
